mapper.select: SELECT * FROM colonel_order_settlement WHERE upstream_key = #{upstreamKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_order_settlement ( id, upstream_key, order_id, product_id, product_name, shop_id, shop_name, pay_amount, settle_amount, estimate_service_fee, effective_service_fee, estimate_tech_service_fee, effective_tech_service_fee, settle_second_colonel_commission, source_amount_unit, colonel_buyin_id, colonel_name, service_fee_rate, commission_rate, colonel_activity_id, second_colonel_buyin_id, second_colonel_activity_id, phase_id, pick_source, talent_external_id, talent_name, flow_point, order_status, order_create_time, pay_time, settle_time, delivery_time, expire_time, cursor, create_time, update_time, deleted, raw_payload ) SELECT #{id}, #{upstreamKey}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{payAmount}, #{settleAmount}, #{estimateServiceFee}, #{effectiveServiceFee}, #{estimateTechServiceFee}, #{effectiveTechServiceFee}, #{settleSecondColonelCommission}, #{sourceAmountUnit}, #{colonelBuyinId}, #{colonelName}, #{serviceFeeRate}, #{commissionRate}, #{colonelActivityId}, #{secondColonelBuyinId}, #{secondColonelActivityId}, #{phaseId}, #{pickSource}, #{talentExternalId}, #{talentName}, #{flowPoint}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderCreateTime}, #{payTime}, #{settleTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{expireTime}, #{cursor}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, CAST(#{rawPayload, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM colonel_order_settlement WHERE upstream_key = #{upstreamKey} )
